security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; script-src 'self'
security.devCsp: default-src 'self' http://localhost:1420; img-src 'self' data: blob: http://localhost:1420; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' http://localhost:1420; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://localhost:1420 ws://localhost:1420; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' http://localhost:1420

bundle.shortDescription: 批量生成、打印并导出会议席卡
bundle.longDescription: 离线批量席卡生成器，支持实时预览、直接打印以及 Word 和 PowerPoint 导出。
